turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, this is Kabir Mehta calling. I'd like to see an ENT specialist. I've had a blocked ear for about a week now and it's getting worse.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello Mr. Mehta! Dr. Sanjay Deshpande is our ENT specialist. He's available tomorrow at 5 PM or the day after at 10 AM. Which suits you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Noted. Can I confirm your mobile number for our records?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 5 PM with Dr. Deshpande. Please avoid putting anything in your ear until the consultation. See you then!
